name: Acuity Scheduling
description: Acuity Scheduling — Online appointment scheduling software with embeddable booking pages and REST API for calendar automation.

seo.title: Acuity Scheduling — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Acuity Scheduling: Acuity Scheduling — Online appointment scheduling software with embeddable booking pages and REST API for calendar automation.

when_to_use: Embeddable booking widget for SaaS onboarding calls
Calendar automation via REST API for B2B workflows
Multi-staff scheduling for clinic appointment management
Automated reminder emails and SMS for appointments
Booking page integration into customer portal

pros: REST API covers full calendar flow
Custom intake forms per appointment type
cons: UI feels dated vs newer rivals
API rate limits tight on lower tiers
review.verdict: Mature scheduling API that still works well, but the Squarespace-era price hikes make it harder to recommend.
review.best_for: Service businesses already on Squarespace needing embedded bookings with intake forms
review.not_for: Startups wanting modern DX or cheap per-user scheduling at scale

lock_in.reason: Calendar data exportable via CSV and API

developer_experience.reason: REST API and webhooks, docs reasonable
